sections.paragraph:
Original: זבח

Transliteration: zebach

Phonetic: zeh'-bakh

BDB Definition:

  1. sacrifice
    1. sacrifices of righteousness
    2. sacrifices of strife
    3. sacrifices to dead things
    4. the covenant sacrifice
    5. the passover
    6. annual sacrifice
    7. thank offering

Origin: from H2076

TWOT entry: 525a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
